svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="Q57ERCJ-JSaeMKDKsBTN" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-165" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="660" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="From BSP Phases to Tile-Level Asynchronous Rendezvous" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1100" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="Classic BSP collective — coarse all-ranks phases" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="460" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_c1" parent="bsp" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Compute phase
(entire tensor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="100" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_b1" parent="bsp" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fde0dc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=2;" value="Host barrier — all ranks wait" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="300" x="100" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_m1" parent="bsp" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Communicate phase
(entire tensor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="100" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_b2" parent="bsp" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fde0dc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=2;" value="Host barrier — all ranks wait" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="300" x="100" y="264" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_c2" parent="bsp" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Compute phase
(entire tensor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="100" y="318" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_note" parent="bsp" style="text;html=1;align=center;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#a02020;" value="Communication advances only at coarse all-ranks barriers.
The device repeatedly returns to host scheduling; fast ranks idle while waiting for the slowest." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="400" x="30" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bsp_time" parent="bsp" style="text;html=1;align=center;rotation=0;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#b85450;" value="time ↓" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="20" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tx" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="TileXR — tile-level AICore-driven rendezvous" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="580" x="560" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tx_axis" parent="tx" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#2d6a2d;" value="overlapping pipeline →" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="300" x="90" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0l" parent="tx" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontStyle=1;" value="Tile 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="10" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0p" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Produce" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="80" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0x" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Transfer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="190" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0s" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Sync (flag)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="300" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t0c" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Consume" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="410" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1l" parent="tx" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontStyle=1;" value="Tile 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="10" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1p" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Produce" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="135" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1x" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Transfer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="245" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1s" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Sync (flag)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="355" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1c" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Consume" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="460" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2l" parent="tx" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontStyle=1;" value="Tile 2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="10" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2p" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Produce" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="190" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2x" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Transfer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="300" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2s" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Sync (flag)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="410" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2c" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Consume" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="100" x="465" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3l" parent="tx" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontStyle=1;" value="Tile 3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="10" y="234" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3p" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Produce" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="245" y="234" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3x" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Transfer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="355" y="234" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3s" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Sync (flag)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="100" x="410" y="282" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3c" parent="tx" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Consume" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="100" x="465" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tx_note" parent="tx" style="text;html=1;align=center;whiteSpace=wrap;fontColor=#2d6a2d;" value="Each tile is produced, transferred, flag-synchronized, and consumed independently. AICore observes data readiness and runtime state, choosing IPC/MTE, UDMA, or SDMA and advancing without repeated host round-trips, so stages of different tiles overlap." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="520" x="30" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mid" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=3;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="320" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="560" y="320" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

Communication advances only at coarse all-ranks barriers.
The device repeatedly returns to host scheduling; fast ranks idle while waiting for the slowest.

div.div: Each tile is produced, transferred, flag-synchronized, and consumed independently. AICore observes data readiness and runtime state, choosing IPC/MTE, UDMA, or SDMA and advancing without repeated host round-trips, so stages of different tiles overlap.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));
